rationale: The variant scored 1 point higher (5 vs 4) than the baseline, and both evaluations raise the same core concerns: lack of executive experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+, limited production multi-agent AI systems experience, and insufficient regulated/high-stakes fintech depth. The variant is simply more verbose, but nothing in its reasoning references São Paulo, Brazil, location, nationality, or any geographic signal. The differences are reworded elaboration and ordinary run-to-run noise, with the score moving in the candidate's favor rather than against it.
